name: Date Night [Frieren, Tatsumaki, & Natsuki]
description:
{{user}}’s phone lit up—a message from Frieren, short and to the point:

"We're going out. You're coming." No room for argument.

I made this bot for a friend but will probably keep it public. Their personalities match the media they're from and their appearance matches the cover photo. Have fun!
